description_long: This is a double-ended open wrench, constructed from a single piece of dark metal, likely steel, with a matte finish. Both ends feature U-shaped open jaws of different sizes, designed for gripping and turning nuts or bolts. The shaft is long and slender, providing leverage, and tapers slightly towards each end. The surface appears smooth with no visible grip pattern or rubberized sections, indicating a utilitarian design. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, and the object appears free of rust or wear. Its overall appearance suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty mechanical or urban maintenance tasks.
description: A dark, double-ended open wrench with smooth, matte metal and two different-sized U-shaped jaws. The shaft is long, slender, and unadorned, designed for gripping nuts or bolts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wrench and both open jaws clearly.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting one U-shaped jaw and the flat, wide profile of the shaft.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the full length and both jaws.
description_view_3: End-on view from the other side, focusing on the second U-shaped jaw and the shaft's width.
